string.text:
Improves sneak ambush dodge (+3% per level, 25% base, 85% cap), PDA sneak speed (+2% per level), ambush drop distance (+1 m per level), and sneak-travel cooldown (-3 min per level, no cooldown at max level).
 
Levels are gained by avoiding hostile encounters or getting ambushed during sneak travel.

$clr_green* $clr_whiteFast-travel sneak bonus improved
$clr_cyan* $clr_whitePDA travel speed increased
$clr_cyan* $clr_whiteAmbush spawn distance increased
$clr_cyan* $clr_whiteSneak-travel cooldown reduced

$clr_green* $clr_whiteFast-travel sneak bonus improved
$clr_cyan* $clr_whitePDA travel speed increased
$clr_cyan* $clr_whiteAmbush spawn distance increased
$clr_cyan* $clr_whiteSneak-travel cooldown reduced
